I propose to sell you the object X for 45 ZUP.

messages.text:
ACCEPT: price=45
I accept your offer to buy the object X for 45 ZUP. Looking forward to completing the trade.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count> 1 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The seller proposes to sell the object X for 45 ZUP, which is well below my maximum willingness to pay of 100 ZUP. This is a good offer for me. I will accept this trade to secure the object at a favorable price. </reason>
<player answer>ACCEPT</player answer>
